title: The Curator of the Flame
description: The Curator offers tea and genuine curiosity. Eleven years studying this room. The most interesting thing to happen all decade is that the party might be looking for something that isn't here.

lines.speaker: Curator
lines.text: Tea? I have tea. It's a restorative, technically. Also it's good tea.

lines.speaker: Curator
lines.text: Since you're not in a hurry — let me tell you about the guardian order. All four of us. What we were made for. What we became instead.

lines.speaker: Curator
lines.text: Before we begin — and we will begin, I'm sorry about that — can I ask what you think is behind the flame? Not the literal throne room. Behind all of it.

lines.speaker: Curator
lines.text: I've studied this room for eleven years. I know exactly what's in it. I am genuinely uncertain if what you're looking for is here. That's the most interesting thing that's happened all decade.
